case_title: NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, INC VS. DERRICK GRREN et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, INC AS TO DEFENDANT GRREN, DERRICK DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, INC SERVED OCT-30-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GRREN, DERRICK
FIRST APPPEARANCE FEE PAID FILED BY DEFENDANT GRREN, DERRICK
CONDITIONAL STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, INC
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO ENFORCE STIPULATED SETTLEMENT AND ENTER JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, INC
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, INC
DECLARATION OF MICHAEL BROWN OF NON-COMPLIANCE WITH CONDITIONAL STIP FOR JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, INC
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIP FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, INC
DECLARATION OF DAVID J BRIGGS FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, INC
ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRREN, DERRICK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 76 WESTBROOK COURT, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94124 $141.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $141.00, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT ENTERED PURSUANT TO THE PARTIES' STIPULATION AND DEFENDANT'S NON-COMPLIANCE THEREWITH
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
